title_en: What Happens When You Don't Play Fair with Supergirl? These Aliens Are About to Find Out
summary_en: With Supergirl flying into theaters on June 26, a new clip from the film was revealed at IGN Live today. In the clip, Kara/Supergirl (Milly Alcock) is attempting to get information in an alien bar filled with unscrupulous types, one of whom has a rather loathsome suggestion for how they can pay her for what she wants involving the young girl she's protecting, Ruthye (Eve Ridley). Kara's suggestion is to instead raise the stakes, while also having them arm wrestle to see who gets what they want... with these guys clearly not understanding who they're messing with.
body_en:
With Supergirl flying into theaters on June 26, a new clip from the film was revealed at IGN Live today.
In the clip, Kara/Supergirl (Milly Alcock) is attempting to get information in an alien bar filled with unscrupulous types, one of whom has a rather loathsome suggestion for how they can pay her for what she wants involving the young girl she's protecting, Ruthye (Eve Ridley). Kara's suggestion is to instead raise the stakes, while also having them arm wrestle to see who gets what they want... with these guys clearly not understanding who they're messing with.
The second movie in the relaunched DCU that kicked off on the big screen with 2025's Superman , Supergirl stars House of the Dragon alum Alcock in the title role alongside Ridley, Jason Momoa as Lobo, Matthias Schoenaerts as Krem, David Krumholtz as Zor-El, Emily Beecham as Alura In-Ze, and David Corenswet reprising his role as Superman.
For more on Supergirl, see IGN's guide to who's who in the new DCU film.
And be sure to keep up with everything going on at IGN Live 2026 . You can check the full schedule to see what else is coming up across games, movies, TV, streaming, and more.
